description: You step onto the main street of Shoeboxlandia. Neat rows of shoebox houses line the road, each one identical and perfectly aligned. Countless eyes glare at you from behind curtains — probably because of the karaoke last night. A shopkeeper's stall and a wise old slipper catch your attention.

wall.description: A low fence made of stacked shoebox lids. Orderly, like everything in Shoeboxlandia.

floor.description: A well-worn brick road. Every shoe in town has walked this path a thousand times.

edge_n.description: The street continues north, back toward Fred's house.

exit_south.description: The road narrows into a dirt trail heading south. You can see the first trees of the Shoelace Forest in the distance.

item_signpost.description: A wooden signpost with arrows pointing in various directions. One reads: 'Shoelace Forest — SOUTH (Enter at your own risk!)'. Another reads: 'Breakfastopia — ???'.

trash_can.description: A smelly metal trash can. It looks like it hasn't been emptied in weeks.

onUse.successMessage: The flashlight beam cuts through the darkness. The corner is now illuminated!
onUse.failureMessage: You shine the flashlight around, but see nothing of interest here.

item.onCollect: You found a working Flashlight hidden under some old shoelaces!

dark_corner.description: A corner. It used to be pitch black, but now your flashlight reveals the dust and debris.

conditions.failMessage: It's pitch black. You'll stumble if you try to step in there without a light source.

item.onCollect: You pick up the shiny Golden Potato hidden in the dust.

exit_east.description: A small crack in the eastern wall. It looks like it leads to a new area.

conditions.failMessage: The crack is too tight to squeeze through alone. If only you had someone to help you push through...

npc_shopkeeper.description: A cheerful sneaker runs a small stall selling odds and ends. A hand-painted sign reads: 'Sal's Surplus — We've got what you need (probably)'.

dialogue.text: "Welcome to Sal's! Business has been slow — nobody in Shoeboxlandia wants anything new. Say, you're that screaming shoe, aren't you? Give me a good SCREAM and I'll toss in a snack for free!"
"HA! That was magnificent! Here, take this breadroll. It's a little stale, but it'll keep your sole together on the road. Heard you're heading to the forest? Brave lad."
"That's all I've got for ya, Fred. Good luck out there — and try not to scream TOO much. Well, actually, scream all you want."

npc_elder.description: An ancient slipper sits on a rocking chair, watching the world go by. His velvet is faded, but his eyes are sharp.

dialogue.text: "Ah, young Fred. I've lived in Shoeboxlandia longer than anyone. Every shoe has its place here, they say. But you... you've never quite fit in, have you?"
dialogue.hint: Talk to Elder Velvet again for directions.

dialogue.text: "Freddista, you say? I remember when she was exiled. The whole town turned against her over rumors — her stare kills, they said. Nonsense, if you ask me. But nobody asked me."

"The Shoelace Forest is straight south from here. Follow the dirt path. But be careful — the forest is full of shoelace snakes. They hiss and they bite. Nasty creatures. If one coils around you, try screaming at it. Works on most things."

"One more thing, Fred. There are lands beyond this one — Breakfastopia, the Electric Desert, places I've only heard of in children's tales. But maybe... maybe they're not just tales. Now go, before I fall asleep."
